assertions.description: U2 is the MP1584 'Mini360' buck converter module with pin names '+Vin', '+Vout', '-Vin', '-Vout' and a description explicitly stating '6.5-24V input, 5V 1.8A output'. The signal_analysis.power_regulators list is empty. The analyzer only flagged a decoupling warning noting '+Vin' lacks capacitors but missed detecting the converter topology entirely. Given the pin names and description, this should be detectable as a switching regulator converting +Vin to +5V.
